title: Morgan’s Rule Turns Violent
description: On pages 17–20, this part turns Zoro’s imprisonment into open action as Luffy forces the fight against Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: One false move and four eyes gets it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you even blink, I'll shoot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't let them win because of me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HEY, IDIOT- SON-OF- THE- CAPTAIN! KOBY MEANS IT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey! I told you not to move or I'd shoot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Fine! I'll just shoot him then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You've assaulted an officer of the Navy!!!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
